ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Revocation Of Probate Of Purported Will (Shown As Will Contest Filed 6/14/24)
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Jan-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Woods, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Rigoberto Caro, Jr., in person, Respondent.
David Ritzinger, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Melvin Couch, Petitioner.
Delia Snyder, via Zoom videoconference, in propria persona, interested party.

At the outset, the court queries Mr. Ritzinger regarding his client's standing. Counsels and Ms. Snyder presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the court's query and regarding the family's history as it pertains to the subject estate.

At the conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jan-13-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Belen. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Revocation Of Probate Of Purported Will (Shown As Will Contest Filed 6/14/24)
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods for and with Rigoberto Caro. Jr. (petitioner).

The court finds that publication is sufficient and that there has been no presumption of Probate Code 6124 because the original will was in the possession of the decedent. Mr. Woods stated that they are not aware of any open probate cases for the deceased children. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated December 15, 1975 is admitted to probate. Rigoberto Caro, Jr. is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. A hearing is set for May 19, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution of the estate, or a report on status of administration in compliance with Probate Code 12200 is to be filed two weeks before the hearing date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
